question: Write a C++ program that prompts the user to enter their first name, last name, and age. Then, display a greeting message including all this information on the console. Ensure appropriate data types are used for each input.

test_cases.expected: Enter your first name: Enter your last name: Enter your age: Hello, Bob Builder! You are 40 years old.
Enter your first name: Enter your last name: Enter your age: Hello, Jane Doe! You are 28 years old.

errors: The greeting message is incomplete, missing the 'Hello, ' prefix and '!' suffix as required by the problem statement, leading to an incorrect output format.
